title: Smoky Chewy Midnight Bun
description: A satisfying and comforting Korean dish featuring a plant-based bun with smoky flavors for midnight cravings.

ingredients.name: Bread Bun
ingredients.notes: Preferably whole wheat or oat-based for texture and nutrition.

ingredients.name: Vegan Mayo
ingredients.notes: Use a low-fat option if desired.

ingredients.name: Smoked Paprika Powder
ingredients.notes: For added depth of flavor and smoked quality.

ingredients.name: Garlic Powder
ingredients.notes: Enhances the savory profile without overpowering other flavors.

instructions: Gently spread vegan mayo inside the bun.
Sprinkle smoked paprika and garlic powder evenly over the mayo.
Place the filled bun on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for about 20 minutes or until golden brown and slightly crispy around the edges.
Serve immediately as a snack or dessert.
